since_last: 49% of 100 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.10%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 49% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.79% · BTC +0.78% · Gold +1.04% · Nasdaq100 -1.88%. 49% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.10%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.10%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -5.08%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: IBM is the standout at -22.40%
cards.body: Leaders: KLAC +4.65%, TER +4.58%, AMAT +4.28%, LRCX +3.77%, NXPI +3.63%. Laggards: IBM -22.40%, WDAY -9.82%, NOW -7.97%, CRM -6.14%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.06% at $139.06
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.06% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
